title: hieracium scalenum
intro: Hieracium scalenum, also known as Devil's-bit or Hawk's Claw, is a flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium scalenum are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Hieracium scalenum can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or capsule, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
